title: Product Page Upgrade
outcome: Build a product template upgrade using metafields, dynamic sections, and a robust product form.

title: AJAX Cart Drawer
outcome: Implement add/change/remove flows, event-driven refreshes, and Section Rendering API updates.

title: Metaobject Content System
outcome: Create reusable FAQs, buying guides, or authors and surface them across a storefront.

title: Embedded Admin App
outcome: Build a small embedded app with App Bridge, Polaris, Admin API reads, and a webhook.

title: Discount Function + Checkout UI
outcome: Implement a Function and a checkout UI extension for a targeted commerce workflow.

title: Hydrogen Storefront MVP
outcome: Build a headless storefront slice using Hydrogen, Storefront API, and Oxygen deployment.
